timeline.label: Johnson & Johnson completed Abiomed acquisition; one non-tradeable CVR issued per tendered share for up to $35 in milestone cash
Contingent Value Rights Agreement executed with American Stock Transfer as rights agent; defines three milestone payments
JNJ announced $380/share upfront cash plus CVR for Abiomed; enterprise value ~$16.6B including cash acquired
Merger agreement signed; tender offer to launch by Nov 15, 2022
Abiomed reported FY2022 record revenue $1.032B; Impella product revenue $985M (+22% YoY)
FDA Approval Milestone deadline: PMA for Impella in STEMI without cardiogenic shock (contractual)
timeline.evidence_ref: CVR Agreement FDA Approval Milestone Period ending Jan 1, 2028

timeline.label: 2028 Measurement Period ends for $3.7B net-sales milestone ($17.50/CVR if achieved on time)
timeline.evidence_ref: CVR Agreement 2028 Measurement Period (JNJ fiscal Q2 2027 through Q1 2028)

timeline.label: Final window for reduced $8.75 net-sales milestone if primary period missed
Clinical Recommendation Milestone outer deadline for Class I ACC/AHA guideline inclusion
timeline.evidence_ref: CVR Agreement Clinical Recommendation Milestone Period

industry.structure: Peripheral and temporary heart-support devices (Impella family) sold into interventional cardiology; post-close Abiomed operates inside JNJ MedTech with JNJ global commercial scale.
industry.share_shift: Impella holds leading share in percutaneous heart pumps; JNJ integration expands hospital access but CVR holders have no equity in that franchise, only contractual cash tails.
industry.trend: Milestone value hinges on net-sales acceleration toward $3.7B and positive STEMI/HRPCI clinical guideline and FDA outcomes through 2028-2029.
